brollLibrary.description: Close-up of hands signing loan paperwork on a desk with a pen.
Mechanic lifting a car with a jack and working near the tire.
A worried person sitting at a kitchen table with bills and envelopes.

scenes.narration: You sign the paperwork, they hand you the keys, and the monthly payment sounds manageable.
But the real cost is not just the car payment. It is insurance, gas, maintenance, and fees stacked on top.
Then the bills hit your kitchen table and suddenly that deal feels different.
